mission.title: buildpacks: Cross-compile binary for ARMv7 and ARM 64
mission.description: Cross-compile binary for ARMv7 and ARM 64. Requested by 13+ users.

steps.title: Check current buildpacks setup
steps.description:
Verify your buildpacks version and configuration:
```bash
pack version
```
This feature requires a working buildpacks installation.

steps.title: Review buildpacks configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:
Current binary distribution for `pack` only supports `amd64` . Adding binaries for ARM will enable `pack` to be used on Raspberry Pi and similar hardware.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Cross-compile binary for ARMv7 and ARM 64
steps.description:
## Summary

After investigating, I put linux `arm64` and `arm7` on hold, due to requiring changes in the lifecycle. Mac M1, on the other hand, can successfully build applications, albeit slowly (due to the lifecycle not having a matching release). As such, this PR builds a Mac Arm64 binary and adds
```yaml
pack build -B gcr.io/buildpacks/builder:v1 ${IMAGE}

ERROR: failed to build: executing lifecycle: failed with status code: 1
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Cross-compile binary for ARMv7 and ARM 64" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
## Summary

After investigating, I put linux `arm64` and `arm7` on hold, due to requiring changes in the lifecycle. Mac M1, on the other hand, can successfully build applications, albeit slowly (due to the lifecycle not having a matching release). As such, this PR builds a Mac Arm64 binary and adds it to our releases. Further, it adds it to our Homebrew tap.
codeSnippets:
pack build -B gcr.io/buildpacks/builder:v1 ${IMAGE}
v1: Pulling from buildpacks/builder
Digest: sha256:889d1cc172467dfb5560c69e5a24d8215804e0fb9ae36e2774f33bc2033ffb8c
Status: Image is up to date for gcr.io/buildpacks/builder:v1
v1: Pulling from buildpacks/gcp/run
Digest: sha256:35c7b9995b7b0ad398e504bc178e38b28626e1ce9052cfeabc8750fc313b4d36
Status: Image is up to date for gcr.io/buildpacks/gcp/run:v1
standard_init_linux.go:190: exec user process caused "exec format error"
ERROR: failed to build: executing lifecycle: failed with status code: 1

prerequisites.description: A working buildpacks installation or development environment.
